adventures.name: Ancient Forest
adventures.description: A mapped path through the eastern woods. Follow the trail from the forest edge to the ancient heart.

event.title: Forest Entrance
event.description: You enter the ancient forest.

adventures.name: Ancient Forest Floor 2
adventures.description: A deeper trail above the ancient heart. The path is mapped, but its encounters are still being shaped.

event.title: Ancient Forest Floor 2 Entrance
event.description: The path back to the first floor remains behind you.

effects.label: Ancient Forest Floor 1
effects.title: Ancient Forest Floor 1
effects.text: You descend back to the first floor.

event.title: Loot Chest
event.description: A sealed chest waits here.

event.title: Healing Shrine
event.description: An old shrine restores part of your health.

event.title: Campfire
event.description: Recover before moving deeper.

event.title: Healing Shrine
event.description: An old shrine restores part of your health.

adventures.name: Crypts
adventures.description: Undead horrors lurk in the dark halls and chambers beneath the earth.

adventures.name: Crypts Floor 2
adventures.description: The lower crypts are colder and older, with one mapped encounter before the sealed boss chamber.

event.title: Crypts Floor 2 Entrance
event.description: The stairs back to the first floor remain behind you.

effects.label: Crypts Floor 1
effects.title: Crypts Floor 1
effects.text: You climb back to the stairway on the first floor.

adventures.name: Orc War Camp
adventures.description: The orcs have fortified their position. Fight through their ranks and defeat the shaman leading them.

adventures.name: Rootspire Tower - The Breach
adventures.description: The broken ground floor of Act 1's final tower. Gargoyles, old oaths, and armored things wait in the breach.

event.title: Tower Breach
event.description: The road is still behind you. Ahead, the lower gate hangs open like a cracked jaw.

effects.title: Leave Rootspire
effects.text: You return to the mountain road.

event.title: Old Knight's Journal
event.description: A damp page survives under a fallen shield: 'Stone remembers the oath. Blood only remembers fear.'

event.title: Stairs to the Halls
event.description: A cracked stairway climbs into the occupied middle floors.

effects.label: The Halls
effects.title: Rootspire Tower - The Halls
effects.text: You climb into the tower halls.

adventures.name: Rootspire Tower - The Halls
adventures.description: The tower's central halls still guard their old routes. Wrong answers and wrong steps wake the tower.

event.title: Floor Two Landing
event.description: The stairs down remain open behind you.

effects.label: The Breach
effects.title: Rootspire Tower - The Breach
effects.text: You descend to the lower breach.

choicePrompt.title: Oath Door Question
choicePrompt.text: A stone door asks what held the old order together.

event.title: Campfire - Abandoned Barracks
event.description: The old hearth still takes flame. The barracks gives you a moment to breathe.

event.title: Broken Armory
event.description: Racks of rusted training weapons hide one serviceable tower relic.

event.title: Stairs to the Spire
event.description: Heat and wingbeats drift down from the upper floors.

effects.label: The Spire
effects.title: Rootspire Tower - The Spire
effects.text: You climb into the upper spire.

adventures.name: Rootspire Tower - The Spire
adventures.description: The upper floors are hot, broken, and full of things that learned to live beneath the wyvern.

event.title: Spire Landing
event.description: The halls below are still reachable, but smoke pushes you upward.

effects.label: The Halls
effects.title: Rootspire Tower - The Halls
effects.text: You descend to the tower halls.

event.title: Disturbed Nest
event.description: A cramped nest of blackened beams blocks the way up. Something small moves in the smoke above it.

event.title: Move in Silence
event.description: You step around broken eggshells and old bones without touching the nest.

effects.successText: The impossible happens: three whelps drop from the rafters.

event.title: Search the Nest
event.description: You move a scorched pack aside and sift through the scraps. Something above you shifts.

effects.successText: The noise carries upward. Three whelps drop into the chamber.
effects.failureText: The nest stirs, then falls quiet.

event.title: Break the Eggs
event.description: You smash the warm shells before anything can crawl out. The answer from above is immediate.

effects.successText: The nest breaks apart. Three whelps dive straight at you.

event.title: Summit Hatch
event.description: The roof hatch glows around the edges. Something enormous moves above it.

effects.label: The Summit
effects.title: Rootspire Tower - The Summit
effects.text: You step onto the roof of Rootspire.

adventures.name: Rootspire Tower - The Summit
adventures.description: The roof is a nest of blackened beams, smoke, and the Act 1 wyvern.

event.title: Rooftop Hatch
event.description: The hatch back into the spire slams in the wind.

event.title: Campfire - Roof Shelter
event.description: A half-collapsed signal shelter blocks enough wind for one final rest.

adventures.name: Rootspire Ability Lab
adventures.description: Developer test hall for Rootspire enemy mechanics. These fights have no rarity, loot, XP, or gold.

event.title: Training Entrance
event.description: Practice copies of Rootspire threats wait in separated test lanes.

effects.title: Leave Lab
effects.text: You return to the world map.

event.title: Armored Mechanics
event.description: Refresh yourself, then test block triggers, ripostes, banners, and stoneguard effects.

event.title: Fire Mechanics
event.description: Refresh yourself, then test quick fire casts and one-second whelp burns.

event.title: Abyss Mechanics
event.description: Refresh yourself, then test Riftbound mechanics and Rootspire event cards.

event.title: Old Knight's Journal
event.description: A damp page survives under a fallen shield: 'Stone remembers the oath. Blood only remembers fear.'

choicePrompt.title: Oath Door Question
choicePrompt.text: A stone door asks what held the old order together.

event.title: Oath Door Question
event.description: A stone door asks what held the old order together.

event.title: Disturbed Nest Test
event.description: Pick how much risk you want to take with the hidden three-whelp ambush roll.

event.title: Move Quietly
event.description: Thread through the beams without touching the nest. This should never call the three-whelp pack.

effects.successText: The impossible happens: three whelps stir in the smoke.

event.title: Search the Nest
event.description: Dig through the scraps and risk waking the small things above you.

effects.successText: The nest erupts. Three whelps answer the noise.
effects.failureText: The smoke shifts, but nothing comes.

event.title: Break the Nest
event.description: Smash the beams and force the three-whelp ambush to happen.

effects.successText: The nest breaks apart. Three whelps dive straight at you.

event.title: Return to Training Hall
event.description: Pick another test lane or repeat one you already cleared.

adventures.name: Dodge Test Range
adventures.description: A reinforced dummy used to practice the wyvern's fire dodge patterns.

event.title: Training Range
event.description: A reinforced dummy stands at the center of the testing floor.

adventures.name: Fallen Summit - The Last Oath
adventures.description: Beyond the Wyvern's nest, the Fallen Knight keeps his final vigil over Act 1. This is the current capstone fight of the first region.

event.title: The Fallen Summit
event.description: The path above Rootspire ends in torn banners, blackened stone, and a knight who has waited too long to remember mercy.

effects.title: Leave
effects.text: You return to the world map.

event.title: Campfire - Fallen Summit
event.description: The wind carries the smell of old iron and something colder. A fire still burns here, though no living hand lit it.

adventures.name: Fallen Knight Mechanics Lab
adventures.description: Developer test fight for the Fallen Knight pillar, spectral, and last-oath mechanics. This copy deals only token damage.

event.title: Fallen Knight Lab
event.description: A harmless copy of the Fallen Knight waits inside a controlled training circle.

effects.title: Leave Lab
effects.text: You return to the world map.

event.title: Training Campfire
event.description: The lab fire restores you before the mechanics test.

adventures.name: The Sunken Forge
adventures.description: The Umbral Key opens the road toward a drowned dwarven mine. For now, only the entrance is mapped.

event.title: The Sunken Forge
event.description: The Umbral Key answers the old lock. Beyond it, rails descend into a dwarven mine swallowed by water, steam, and old iron. The full descent will be built later.

effects.title: Leave
effects.text: You return to the world map.

adventures.name: Wolf Glade
adventures.description: Wolves stake their territory here. Bring a sharp blade.

adventures.name: Blood Rat Den
adventures.description: A burrow infested with blood rats and the forest wisps that feed on the fallen.

adventures.name: Boar Hollow
adventures.description: Wild boars roam this muddy hollow. Watch your footing.

adventures.name: Crow Thicket
adventures.description: A dense thicket where crow swarms nest and forest spirits drift between the branches.

adventures.name: Bandit Trail
adventures.description: Forest bandits ambush travellers on this road. Two guards patrol the crossing.

adventures.name: Deep Grove
adventures.description: Deep in the ancient forest, two Armored Bears guard the ancient clearing.

adventures.name: Broodmother Phase Lab
adventures.description: Developer test for the Broodmother cocoon transform and Phase 2 transition. No rewards.

event.title: Broodmother Phase Lab
event.description: Full-strength Broodmother inside. Tests cocoon transform and Phase 2 activation.

effects.title: Leave Lab
effects.text: You return to the world map.

event.title: Testing Campfire
event.description: Restores you fully before the phase mechanics test.

adventures.name: Ancient Forest
adventures.description: A vast forest teeming with wildlife and danger. Face its creatures to prove your worth.

adventures.name: Spider Nest
adventures.description: A dark cave choked with webs. Spiders grow deadlier the deeper you venture.

adventures.name: Rootspire Tower
adventures.description: Ascend the cursed tower floor by floor, from gargoyle-haunted halls to the wyvern-crowned summit.
